title: As Hegseth proclaims victory in Iran war, Caine takes cautious tone
summary_full: The defense secretary described the state of hostilities mostly in past tense. The Joint Chiefs chairman noted that the “ceasefire is a pause” in combat operations.
summary_public: The defense secretary described the state of hostilities mostly in past tense. The Joint Chiefs chairman noted that the “ceasefire is a pause” in combat operations.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: victory in Iran war, Caine takes cautious tone
